## OS Specific Installations {#osinstall}

PEcAn installation steps vary depending on your operating system. Follow the instructions for your OS below, then see the sections on installing models and data to complete your setup.

- [Ubuntu](#ubuntu)
- [CentOS](#centosredhat)
- [OSX](#macosx)
- [Install BETY](#install-bety) THIS PAGE IS DEPRECATED
- [Install Models](#install-models)
- [Install Data](#install-data)
